name: milan-remote-work-map
description: Find places to work remotely in Milan

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace=backend && npm run typecheck --workspace=e2e
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=frontend && npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=e2e && npm run lint --workspace=deploy/webhook
